description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with dark skin, adorned in a single-shoulder, knee-length wrap garment featuring a multicolored, checkered pattern. The figure is bald and wears large hoop earrings, a beaded necklace, and metal wristbands on both arms. The garment is draped over the left shoulder, leaving the right shoulder and much of the chest and back exposed. The figure is barefoot, and the overall appearance suggests a traditional or tribal aesthetic. The facial features are strong and expressive, with visible facial markings or adornments. The posture is upright and slightly dynamic, with arms slightly bent and fingers spread.
description: A muscular adult male in a single-shoulder, patterned wrap garment with tribal jewelry and barefoot, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the exposed right shoulder, chest, facial adornments, and the draped garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped garment, and the arm jewelry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back, the way the garment wraps around the body, and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exposed right arm and chest, as well as the garment's fit and jewelry.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional single-shoulder wrap garment with jewelry and accessories
